common.all_clear: No items requiring immediate attention. Everything is in order.

hero.title: Find the perfect expert for all your work
hero.subtitle: The leading platform connecting customers and qualified artisans in Algeria. Covering all 58 wilayas with verified profiles and guaranteed security.

how_it_works.title: How it works?
how_it_works.subtitle: Two simple ways to use our platform according to your needs.
how_it_works.recommended_desc: Most clients receive accurate proposals within 24 hours.

client_steps.title: Create your account
client_steps.desc: Sign up for free in just a few seconds.

client_steps.title: Post your request
client_steps.desc: Describe your need clearly and add your location.

client_steps.title: Compare proposals
client_steps.desc: Receive artisan responses and choose the best match.

client_steps.title: Confirm and review
client_steps.desc: Validate the intervention and leave your rating.

direct_steps.title: Create your account
direct_steps.desc: Sign up to access verified artisan profiles.

direct_steps.title: Search artisans
direct_steps.desc: Filter by trade, wilaya, availability, and rating.

direct_steps.title: Contact directly
direct_steps.desc: Chat with the artisan and schedule the job.

features.title: Why DzArtisan?
features.subtitle: We put quality and trust at the heart of every intervention.

verified.title: Verified artisans
verified.desc: Every profile is reviewed before publication to ensure trust and quality.

fast.title: Fast response
fast.desc: Get quick replies tailored to your request and location.

coverage.title: Nationwide coverage
coverage.desc: Find qualified artisans across multiple wilayas with precise filters.

secure.title: Secure platform
secure.desc: Your data and exchanges are protected through a reliable infrastructure.

pricing.title: Boost your business
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that matches your artisan ambitions.
pricing.note: Payment available via Edahabia, CIB, or CCP with admin validation.

basic.name: Basic
basic.benefit: Essential visibility to launch your activity

pro.name: Pro
pro.benefit: More visibility and priority access to requests

premium.name: Premium
premium.benefit: Higher ranking and stronger profile exposure

annual.name: Annual
annual.benefit: Best value with continuous visibility all year

cta_banner.title: Accelerate your artisan business
cta_banner.subtitle: Join the trusted professional network in Algeria.

authentication.login_subtitle: Sign in to access your dashboard.
authentication.register_subtitle: Join the largest community of artisans in Algeria.
authentication.password_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters.
authentication.name_artisan_hint: This name will appear on your public profile. Any future changes will require verification.
authentication.artisan_pending_note: Your account will require validation by our administrative team before your profile becomes public.
authentication.duplicate_email: This email is already registered. Please log in.
authentication.duplicate_phone: This phone number is already associated with an account.
authentication.forgot_subtitle: Enter your email to receive a secure reset link.
authentication.forgot_success_msg: If this email exists in our system, a reset link has been sent to you.
authentication.reset_success_msg: Your password has been successfully reset.
authentication.invalid_token: The reset link is invalid or expired.
authentication.network_error: Server is unreachable. Please check your connection.
authentication.no_account: Don't have an account? Sign up
authentication.have_account: Already have an account? Sign in
authentication.email_hint: Enter the email associated with your account
authentication.error: Une erreur est survenue. Veuillez réessayer.

history.title: My Request History
history.empty_desc: You haven't posted any service requests yet. Find a qualified artisan now!

review_modal.title: Leave a Review
review_modal.subtitle: Your feedback helps the community and encourages quality artisans.

artisan_management.title: Artisan Management
artisan_management.subtitle: Validate registrations, manage suspensions, and highlight your top experts.

table.no_data: No artisans found in this category.

modals.rejection_label: Explain why the application is rejected (will be sent by email)
modals.suspension_label: Explain the reason for suspension (will be sent by email)

subscription_management.title: Subscription Management
subscription_management.subtitle: Track revenue, validate manual payments, and manage activation periods.

complaints_management.title: Complaints Management
complaints_management.subtitle: Manage disputes between clients and artisans, investigate cases and take moderation measures.

user_management.title: User Management
user_management.subtitle: Manage client and artisan accounts, communicate, and moderate the community.

modals.delete_warning: This action is irreversible. All personal data will be anonymized in accordance with law 18-07.

statistics.title: Statistics & Analytics
statistics.subtitle: Track platform activity, client satisfaction, and artisan performance.

ranking.title: Responsiveness Ranking
ranking.subtitle: Top performing artisans by response time.

onboarding.title: Set up your profile
onboarding.subtitle: Complete this information to become visible to clients in Algeria.
onboarding.name_edit_desc: Your full name is used for billing and client trust. it must match your official documents.
onboarding.categories_desc: Select one or more areas of expertise.
onboarding.wilayas_desc: In which wilayas can you travel?
onboarding.about_placeholder: Ex: I am a certified plumber with 5 years of experience. I specialize in boiler installation...
onboarding.availability_desc: Indicate if you are ready to receive requests immediately.
onboarding.error_required_fields: Please fill in all required fields.

artisan_waiting.title: Profile Under Review
artisan_waiting.explanation: Our team is currently reviewing your information. We will respond within a maximum of 48 business hours.
artisan_waiting.info_spam: Don't forget to check your spam.

dashboard.completeness_tip: A complete profile receives 3x more contacts.

subscription.title: Subscription Management
subscription.subtitle: Boost your visibility and unlock premium features.
subscription.trial_used_note: Discovery trial has already been used on this account.

search.geo_denied: Geolocation was denied. Please use the Wilaya filter.
search.no_results: No artisans found for your search.
search.no_results_hint: Try broadening your filters or reset the search.

step1.title: Intervention details
step1.headline: What are you looking for?
step1.description_placeholder: Explain your need precisely (materials, urgency, symptoms...)

step2.title: Where is the intervention?
step2.method_title: How do you want to indicate your location?
step2.map_hint: You can drag the pin for more precision

step3.title: Photos & Summary
step3.upload_hint: Drag and drop or click to browse

success.title: Request published!
success.message: Your request has been successfully recorded. Artisans in your area can now contact you.

cookie_consent.title: We use cookies
cookie_consent.description: DzArtisan uses cookies to improve your experience, ensure the security of your data, and analyze our traffic, in accordance with Algerian law n° 18-07 on the protection of individuals in the processing of personal data.

success.title: Request published!

requests.title: My Service Requests
requests.subtitle: Track the status of your requests and view artisan proposals.

card.no_requests: You have no requests in this category.

details.title: Request Details
details.no_proposals: No proposals yet. We have notified artisans in your area.
details.cancel_confirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this request? This action is irreversible.

jobs.title: Job Opportunities
jobs.subtitle: Find projects that match your skills in your area.

modal.title: Send a Proposal
modal.placeholder: Briefly describe why you are the best for this project (e.g., similar experience, immediate availability...)
modal.success: Your proposal has been sent successfully!

empty.no_jobs: No new opportunities for now. We will alert you as soon as a client posts a project in your categories.
empty.no_applied: You haven't applied to any projects yet.

interventions.title: Project Management
interventions.subtitle: Track the status of your ongoing interventions and manage your photo documentation.

details.title: Intervention Details
details.confirm_finish: Do you want to mark this intervention as finished? The client will be notified.

empty.no_active: You have no ongoing interventions. Find new opportunities in the job board.
